title: obione expansa
intro: Obione expansa, also known as sea purslane, is a type of succulent plant that grows in coastal areas and is characterized by its succulent stems and leaves. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Obione expansa include reducing inflammation and improving skin health, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing the plant with a solvent to extract its active compounds.
